additional_testcases.testcase:
public void testNoInlineAliasesInWhileLoop() {
    testSame(
        "function f() { " +
        "  var i = 0;" +
        "  while (i < 5) {" +
        "    var x = extern();" +
        "    (function() {" +
        "       var y = x; window.setTimeout(function() { extern(y); }, 0);" +
        "     })();" +
        "    i++;" +
        "  }" +
        "}");
  }
